MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Feb-09-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS THE HARTFORD FINANCIAL SERVICES GROUP, INC., SENTINEL INSURANCE COMPANY, LTD.'s MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE:

The verified application of Sarah D. Gordon to appear as counsel pro hac vice to defendants is granted. No opposition filed, and the application conforms to Cal. R. Ct. 9.40.

Order is signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
